summary: The diff implements a substantial portion of the requested Home Service Marketplace application. Many frontend components for Customer, Technician, and Admin panels are present, along with a Motoko backend file. However, the backend file is truncated and many critical backend endpoints cannot be confirmed. Several frontend screens appear to use mock/static data rather than live backend calls. Key requirements around notifications, some admin screens, and specific backend logic details cannot be fully verified from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Define Motoko backend data schema with stable storage for all nine core collections including all specified fields
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo is truncated. Only partial type definitions are visible (UserProfile, ServiceCategory, Service, Address). Types for bookings, payments, wallets, reviews, referrals, technicians are not confirmed. Stable variables backing each collection are not visible — only Map.empty() calls without the 'stable' keyword are shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Role-based access control with three roles (Customer, Technician, Admin); each backend function checks role; unauthorized calls return explicit error variant
missing_requirements.reason: The truncated backend uses an external AccessControl module rather than a self-contained role enum. Only requireAdmin/requireUser guards are visible. The Technician role variant and its enforcement are not confirmed. The spec requires an explicit error variant return, but the implementation uses Runtime.trap (panics), not returning an error variant.

missing_requirements.requirement: registerUser, verifyOTP, logout endpoints; auto-login via stored principal
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and these endpoints are not visible. The frontend AuthFlow uses Internet Identity login only with no phone/OTP backend call to a registerUser or verifyOTP endpoint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Full booking lifecycle: createBooking, assignTechnician, updateBookingStatus, getBooking, listBookingsByCustomer, listBookingsByTechnician, listAllBookings with status filtering
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and these endpoints are not confirmed. Customer BookingsView uses hardcoded MOCK_BOOKINGS rather than backend queries. Admin BookingsManagement also uses MOCK_BOOKINGS.

missing_requirements.requirement: Payment and wallet endpoints: recordPayment, deductFromWallet, addToWallet, getWalletBalance, generateInvoice
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and these endpoints are not confirmed. Frontend BookingConfirmation generates a booking ID client-side with Math.random() rather than calling a backend createBooking or recordPayment endpoint.

missing_requirements.requirement: Technician workflow endpoints: markReached, markStarted, addExtraItems, generateFinalBill, markCompleted with commission deduction
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and these endpoints are not confirmed to exist.

missing_requirements.requirement: Earnings endpoints for technicians: getDailyEarnings, getWeeklyEarnings, getTotalEarnings, getCommissionDeductions
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated. TechnicianApp file content is omitted from the diff due to file limits and cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Review and rating endpoints: submitReview, getReviewsByTechnician, getReviewsByService with validation
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated. The BookingsView detail shows a review form but uses mock data without confirmed backend calls.

missing_requirements.requirement: Referral system: generateReferralCode, applyReferralCode, grantReferralReward, getReferralStats
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and these endpoints are not confirmed. RewardsView file is not in the shown diff content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin management endpoints: blockUser, unblockUser, addTechnician, assignServiceArea, approveDocument, suspendTechnician, reactivateTechnician, getAdminReports, setTechnicianCommission, createOffer, updateOffer, listOffers
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated. Admin frontend screens use local mock state rather than backend calls for most operations. Offers management backend endpoints are not confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Booking detail with technician info, live status timeline, invoice summary, and review form only for Completed bookings backed by real data
missing_requirements.reason: BookingsView uses mock data and the detail view implementation is truncated. Cannot confirm vertical status timeline and invoice summary are implemented with backend data.

missing_requirements.requirement: Customer Rewards/Wallet screen with wallet balance, transaction history, referral code with clipboard copy, referral stats
missing_requirements.reason: RewardsView file content is omitted from the diff due to file limits and cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Technician frontend: OTP login, dashboard with Accept/Reject, active job workflow, earnings tabs
missing_requirements.reason: TechnicianApp file content is omitted from the diff due to file limits and cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin User Management: paginated table with name, phone, role, status, join date columns; user detail panel showing bookings count and wallet balance
missing_requirements.reason: UsersManagement only shows principal ID and approval status columns, not name, phone, role, or join date. User detail panel does not show bookings count or wallet balance.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Technician Management Suspend/Reactivate toggle with confirmation dialog
missing_requirements.reason: TechniciansManagement toggleSuspend fires immediately without a confirmation dialog. The spec requires confirmation before proceeding.

missing_requirements.requirement: Admin Booking Management with date range picker and Assign Technician dropdown showing only active technicians
missing_requirements.reason: BookingsManagement has a single date input field, not a range picker. The technician dropdown uses a hardcoded TECHNICIANS array without filtering by active status.

missing_requirements.requirement: Reports data fetched from the backend via React Query
missing_requirements.reason: ReportsScreen uses entirely hardcoded mock data (DAILY_REVENUE, MONTHLY_REVENUE, TECHNICIAN_PERFORMANCE) with no React Query calls to the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend notifications endpoint; frontend polling via React Query; unread count badge; marking as read updates backend; all five notification types
missing_requirements.reason: Backend is truncated and notifications endpoint is not confirmed. NotificationBell component is imported but its implementation file is omitted from the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: UserApproval approval/rejection system with requestApproval, setApproval, listApprovals endpoints used for user management
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies block/unblock by isBlocked flag for user management. The implementation introduces a separate UserApproval module with ApprovalStatus (approved/rejected) that is not part of the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Client-side booking ID generation using Math.random() and Date.now() in the frontend
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requires the backend to generate booking IDs via createBooking endpoint. The frontend generates this ID client-side in BookingConfirmation without calling the backend.

hallucinated_features.description: ProfileSetupModal for user profile creation shown after Internet Identity login
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not mention a profile setup modal. Auth flow is specified as phone entry to OTP to home, not Internet Identity login followed by a profile setup modal.

hallucinated_features.description: External module imports for authorization/access-control, user-approval/approval, and authorization/MixinAuthorization
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requires all backend logic to remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo. The implementation imports from multiple external module files violating this constraint.
